summary: Phase 3 Review Queue testing completed successfully. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - DesignReviewQueue page renders with all components (stats cards, tabs, empty state). Fixed missing Review Queue sidebar link for Founder role.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/design-manager/review-queue returns 200
Backend: Review queue response includes stats object with pending_designs, pending_timelines, upcoming_meetings, total_action_items
Backend: Pending designs stats have total, overdue, due_soon fields
Backend: Pending timelines stats have total field
Backend: Upcoming meetings stats have total, critical, not_submitted, pending_review fields
Backend: Review queue response includes pending_designs, pending_timelines, upcoming_meetings arrays
Backend: GET /api/design-manager/upcoming-meetings returns 200
Backend: Upcoming meetings accepts days_ahead parameter (default 14)
Backend: Upcoming meetings response has total_meetings, ready_count, needs_review_count, not_submitted_count, by_urgency, all_meetings
Backend: Upcoming meetings are categorized by urgency (critical, high, medium, low)
Backend: GET /api/design-manager/overdue-reviews returns 200
Backend: Overdue reviews response has total_overdue, critical_count, overdue_reviews fields
Backend: Review queue requires manager permissions (401/403 for unauthenticated)
Backend: Total action items equals sum of all pending items
Backend: Empty queue returns valid structure with zero counts
Backend: Empty overdue reviews returns zero counts
Frontend: Login with founder credentials successful
Frontend: Review Queue page loads with correct title
Frontend: Pending Designs stats card displayed
Frontend: Timeline Approvals stats card displayed
Frontend: Upcoming Meetings stats card displayed
Frontend: Total Actions stats card displayed
Frontend: All Items tab present
Frontend: Design Submissions tab present
Frontend: Timelines tab present
Frontend: Upcoming Meetings tab present
Frontend: Overdue tab present
Frontend: Empty state 'All Caught Up!' message displayed when no pending items
Frontend: Tab navigation works (Overdue, Upcoming Meetings)
Frontend: Refresh button functional
Frontend: Review Queue link visible in sidebar for Founder role (after fix)
Frontend: Navigation from sidebar to Review Queue page works
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py (lines 16805-17213): Complete Review Queue API implementation with 3 endpoints
Backend: review-queue endpoint combines pending designs, pending timelines, and upcoming meetings into comprehensive queue
Backend: upcoming-meetings endpoint categorizes meetings by urgency (critical <=2 days, high <=5 days, medium <=10 days, low >10 days)
Backend: overdue-reviews endpoint returns submissions past deadline with days_overdue calculation
Frontend DesignReviewQueue.jsx: Well-structured page with stats cards, tabs, and empty state handling
Frontend: Uses proper API integration with axios and error handling via toast
Frontend Sidebar.jsx: Review Queue link added for Admin (line 153), DesignManager (line 207), and Founder (line 282) roles
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Queue is empty because there are no pending items or upcoming meetings within 14 days. Test project proj_8aeea5f1 has approved designs for design_meeting_2 and design_meeting_3_final.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Review Queue is fully functional. Backend APIs tested via pytest (17 tests passed). Frontend UI tested via Playwright. The queue shows empty state gracefully when no items. Upcoming meetings only appear if they fall within the date range (default 14 days) AND don't have approved designs. Review Queue link is now visible in sidebar for Admin, DesignManager, and Founder roles.

review_queue_api.returns: Comprehensive queue with stats (pending_designs, pending_timelines, upcoming_meetings, total_action_items) and data arrays

upcoming_meetings_api.returns: Meetings in next N days categorized by urgency (critical/high/medium/low) with approval status

overdue_reviews_api.returns: Past-due submissions with days_overdue and urgency level

frontend_review_queue_page.features: Stats cards, 5 tabs (All Items, Design Submissions, Timelines, Upcoming Meetings, Overdue), empty state handling, refresh button

fix_applied.issue: Review Queue link was missing from sidebar for Founder role
fix_applied.fix: Added { path: '/design-review-queue', label: 'Review Queue', icon: ClipboardCheck } to Founder role nav items
